sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Sun Life hits 100 in the Philippines with three new offices
feed.summary: Sun Life of Canada (Philippines), Inc. has reached a milestone of 100 business offices in the Philippines by opening three new locations in Metro Manila and Central Luzon. This expansion follows 15 consecutive years of market leadership, with Sun Life reporting a total premium income of ₱61.8 billion in 2025. The company plans further digital and advisor network expansion in 2026.

feed.title: Buffett bets on Kraft Heinz as shock split suspended
feed.summary: Berkshire Hathaway has confirmed it has no immediate plans to sell its stake in Kraft Heinz after the food giant halted its strategy to split into two separate entities. Instead, Kraft Heinz plans to invest $600m into developing new products and lowering prices, signaling a commitment to reinvention. This pivot is seen as an attempt to reignite growth and show organic value creation before any future structural changes.

feed.title: State Street Group Exits Substantial Holder Position in Chalice Mining
feed.summary: State Street Corporation and its subsidiaries are no longer substantial shareholders in Chalice Mining Limited as of March 4, 2026. This change is due to collateral-related transfers of Chalice shares, reducing State Street's voting power below the substantial holding threshold. This development could impact Chalice Mining's institutional ownership profile, market dynamics, and liquidity.

feed.title: Charles Schwab Corp.: Is This Finance Giant Still a Buy for 2026?
feed.summary: Charles Schwab Corp. (SCHW) has transitioned from crisis recovery to a quiet comeback story, making it a compelling consideration for investors in 2026. The company, a major US retail broker, has shown stabilization in earnings reports following interest rate shocks and benefits from massive client assets and the continued growth of retail investing. While high-quality, Schwab's stock remains sensitive to interest rate fluctuations, regulatory changes, and intense competition within the financial services sector.

feed.title: Humana Prices $1 Billion Subordinated Notes Offering
feed.summary: Humana Inc. has announced the pricing of a $1 billion offering of subordinated notes. The offering consists of fixed-to-fixed rate junior subordinated notes due in 2056. This financial move follows other recent news from Humana, including new value-based cardiology care partnerships and reaffirming its adjusted EPS guidance for 2026.

feed.title: Western Digital Bets On Pure HDD Future With Hyperscaler AI Demand
feed.summary: Western Digital has transitioned to a pure-play hard disk drive (HDD) company after divesting its flash business. It has secured long-term agreements with hyperscalers, fully booking its HDD production capacity through at least 2028, positioning itself as a critical infrastructure provider for AI and cloud data storage. This strategic shift, coupled with a $3.1 billion stake sale and debt redemption, aims to enhance financial stability and capitalize on the growing demand for large-capacity storage.
